channel.title: BitDevsMauritius
channel.description: BitDevsMauritius is a community in Mauritius, for those interested in discussing and participating in the research and development of Bitcoin and related protocols and software.

item.title: Socratic Seminar #5
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Location

The event will be hosted at ALCHE:

Alche Pamplemousses, Mauritius | Map

Announcements

Join us for our Fifth Bitcoin Socratic Seminar! A special thank you to our sponsor Btrust.

Reminders

  • We prefer no photos and no videos during the event
  • Chatham House Rule
  • Leave the meeting space as clean as you found it
  • Suggest topics for the next Socratic Seminar! Where to find topics?

Topics

Lightning Network Fundamentals + Bitcoin & Quantum Considerations

Duration: 1 Hour 5 Minutes Audience: Developers, CS students, security-focused builders

Meetup Agenda

1. Opening & Context (5 minutes)

  • Welcome and session framing
  • Why Lightning Network matters for Bitcoin scalability
  • Introducing the idea of long-term security (including quantum considerations)

2. Lightning Network — Beginner Foundations (25 minutes)

Objective: Build a clear mental model of Lightning

  • What the Lightning Network is and why it exists
  • Payment channels: opening, updating, closing
  • Off-chain vs on-chain transactions
  • HTLCs (Hashed Time-Locked Contracts) simplified
  • Routing payments across the network

Discussion:

  • How Lightning improves speed and cost
  • Trade-offs and limitations

3. Bitcoin & Quantum Considerations (20 minutes)

Objective: Introduce future-facing security thinking

  • What quantum computing is (high-level)
  • Why it matters for cryptography in Bitcoin
  • Potential risks to elliptic curve cryptography
  • Current state: theoretical vs practical threat

Reference Discussion:

  • Insights from bitcoin-quantum
  • Possible mitigation paths (quantum-resistant signatures, migration paths)

4. Open Discussion & Builder Direction (15 minutes)

  • Should Bitcoin developers care about quantum today?
  • How to start exploring Lightning development
  • Pathways into research and contribution
  • Btrust Builder Pathways (5 minutes)
  • Btrust Builders

item.title: Socratic Seminar #4
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Location

The event will be hosted at ALCHE:

Alche Pamplemousses, Mauritius | Map

Announcements

Join us for our Fourth Bitcoin Socratic Seminar! A special thank you to our sponsor Btrust.

Reminders

  • We prefer no photos and no videos during the event
  • Chatham House Rule
  • Leave the meeting space as clean as you found it
  • Suggest topics for the next Socratic Seminar! Where to find topics?

Topics

Encryption & A Deep Dive into Nostr Relays

Duration: 1 Hour

Speakers: Hanif (Coordinator), Bruno Bernard (Main Speaker)

Meetup Agenda

1. Opening & Context (5 minutes)

Speaker: Hanif

  • Welcome and session overview
  • Why encryption matters in decentralized systems
  • Introduction to Nostr and its relevance

2. Encryption Fundamentals in Nostr (15 minutes)

Speaker: Bruno Bernard

  • Public/private key cryptography in Nostr
  • How identities are derived from keys
  • Event signing and verification
  • Basic encryption model used in Nostr communication

3. Nostr Relay Architecture Deep Dive (25 minutes)

Speaker: Bruno Bernard

  • What a relay is and its role in the protocol
  • Client-relay interaction model
  • Event propagation and storage
  • Relay policies, censorship resistance, and trade-offs
  • Security considerations in relay design

4. Practical Discussion & Use Cases (10 minutes)

Speaker: Bruno Bernard

  • How developers can interact with relays
  • Common tools and implementations
  • Real-world use cases and challenges

5. Open Q&A and Closing (5 minutes)

Speaker: Hanif

  • Questions and discussion
  • Key takeaways
  • Next meetup preview
  • Btrust Builders

item.title: Socratic Seminar #3
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Location

The event will be hosted at ALCHE:

Alche Pamplemousses, Mauritius | Map

Announcements

Join us for our Third Bitcoin Socratic Seminar! A special thank you to our sponsor Btrust.

Reminders

  • We prefer no photos and no videos during the event
  • Chatham House Rule
  • Leave the meeting space as clean as you found it
  • Suggest topics for the next Socratic Seminar! Where to find topics?

Topics

Cryptographic Security in Bitcoin

Duration: 1 Hour

Meetup Agenda

1. Opening & Context (5 minutes)

Objective: Establish why cryptography is the backbone of Bitcoin.

  • Bitcoin as a system secured by mathematics rather than institutional trust
  • The two core pillars: hashing and digital signatures
  • How this session builds on the previous deep dive into transactions

2. SHA-256 and Hashing in Bitcoin (25 minutes)

Objective: Understand how hashing secures blocks and transactions.

  • What a cryptographic hash function is
  • Core properties: determinism, preimage resistance, collision resistance
  • SHA-256 in Proof-of-Work
  • Double SHA-256 in block headers
  • Hashing in transaction IDs and Merkle trees

Discussion + Walkthrough:

  • Examine the structure of a block header
  • Identify which fields are hashed
  • Explain why double hashing is used

3. Elliptic Curve Cryptography (25 minutes)

Objective: Understand ownership and signature validation.

  • Public/private key cryptography fundamentals
  • The secp256k1 curve used in Bitcoin
  • Private key → Public key derivation
  • Overview of ECDSA and Schnorr signatures
  • How signatures authorize spending of UTXOs

Conceptual Walkthrough:

  • From private key to public key
  • From public key to address
  • Where signature verification happens in validation

4. Base58 and Address Encoding (5 minutes)

Objective: Briefly introduce encoding and checksum design.

  • Why Bitcoin does not use raw public keys directly
  • Base58Check and checksum protection
  • How encoding improves usability and error detection
  • Btrust Builders

item.title: Socratic Seminar #2
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Location

The event will be hosted at ALCHE:

Alche Pamplemousses, Mauritius | Map

Announcements

Join us on our Second Bitcoin Socratic Seminar! A special thank you to our sponsor Btrust.

Reminders

  • We prefer no photos and no videos during the event
  • Chatham House Rule
  • Leave the meeting space as clean as you found it
  • Suggest topics for the next Socratic Seminar! Where to find topics?

Topics

Blockchain Transactions

Meetup Agenda 12:00 – 12:05 — Welcome & Opening

Speaker: Hanif

Introduction to BitDevs Mauritius

Session goals and overview

12:05 – 12:20 — Anatomy of a Bitcoin Transaction

-Sadiq What a transaction is in Bitcoin

Inputs and outputs

UTXO model explained

Transaction flow from creation to confirmation

12:20 – 12:40 — Transaction Structure & Formatting

-Sadiq

Transaction fields breakdown

Version, locktime, scripts

Serialization format (raw transaction bytes)

Transaction IDs and hashing

12:40 – 12:55 — Parsing Bitcoin Transactions (Practical Walkthrough)

-Sadiq

Reading a raw transaction

Decoding inputs/outputs

Understanding scriptSig and scriptPubKey

12:55 – 13:00 — Discussion & Closing

Open questions

Btrust Builders

Suggested resources for deeper study

  • Btrust Builders : January 31th, 2026

item.title: Socratic Seminar #1
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Location

The event will be hosted at Middlesex University:

Middlesex University Mauritius, Coastal Road, 90203, Uniciti, Mauritius | Map

Announcements

Join us on our Second Bitcoin Socratic Seminar! A special thank you to our sponsor Btrust for food and refreshments.

Reminders

  • We prefer no photos and no videos during the event
  • Chatham House Rule
  • Leave the meeting space as clean as you found it
  • Suggest topics for the next Socratic Seminar! Where to find topics?

Topics

Blockchain 101 × Bitcoin Network

Meetup Agenda

12:30 – 12:35 Welcome & Introduction Fauziyya & Denzel

12:35 – 12:55

Sadiq Blockchain 101 × Bitcoin Network How Bitcoin Works Btrust Developer Program

12:55 – 13:15 Bruno Open Source Contribution

13:15 – 13:30 Q&A / Interactive Discussion

Upcoming Events

  • Btrust DevDay : December 2nd, 2025
  • Africa Bitcoin Conference : Dec 1th - 5th, 2025

item.title: Socratic Seminar #0
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Location

The event will be hosted at TheHive Mauritius:

THE HIVE workplace CapTamarin, Mauritius | Map

Announcements

Join us on our Second Bitcoin Socratic Seminar! A special thank you to our sponsor Btrust for food and refreshments.

Reminders

  • We prefer no photos and no videos during the event
  • Chatham House Rule
  • Leave the meeting space as clean as you found it
  • Suggest topics for the next Socratic Seminar! Where to find topics?

Topics

Understanding Bitcoin

MC: Sadiq

  • BitDevs Mauritius
  • How does Bitcoin work?
  • Bitcoin Wallets: Understanding How They Works
  • Btrust Developer Program
  • The Bitcoin Network

Upcoming Events

  • Btrust DevDay : December 2nd, 2025
  • Africa Bitcoin Conference : Dec 1th - 5th, 2025
